x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Hardware asset volume determines the breadth of Now Assist HAM AI analysis. Without sufficient asset records, AI refresh recommendations and lifecycle insights are limited in scope and reliability.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("alm_hardware"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var total = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total >= 500) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: total + " hardware asset records", finding: total + " hardware assets. Now Assist HAM has sufficient asset data for AI-powered lifecycle analysis and refresh recommendations." }; } else if (total >= 100) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: total + " hardware asset records", finding: "Only " + total + " hardware assets (target: 500+). Now Assist HAM AI analysis will have limited coverage across the hardware estate." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: total + " hardware asset records", finding: "Only " + total + " hardware assets. Insufficient data for meaningful Now Assist HAM AI lifecycle recommendations." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure all hardware assets are tracked in ServiceNow. Import asset records from existing asset repositories or enable Discovery to automatically populate hardware asset records.
